programme.desc: Our butter-basted haddock is light in texture and rich in flavor. Oysters: where to buy them, how to shuck them, and most importantly, how to eat them. And finally, smoked salmon: the perfect make-ahead party appetizer.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: Take a trip down memory lane with our flaky apple turnovers. Next, we test the most popular pie weights on the market. Then, five simple ideas to level up your cake decorating game. And finally, chocolate chip cookies: the ultimate comfort food.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: Learn our fool-proof, one-pan method for making a full breakfast in the morning. Then, we crack the code for making crater-sized pancakes. And finally, a show-stopping make-ahead French toast casserole.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: When the weather turns cold, warm up with a silky white bean soup. Then, learn to make homemade chicken stock using a convenient kitchen tool. Finally, we put slow cookers and Instant Pots to the ultimate test.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: We test the most popular coffee makers on the market. Then, we'll show you how to make homemade cold brew. And finally, we'll walk you through the complex and fascinating science of tea.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: Two ways to use a grocery-store rotisserie chicken for spectacular results. Next, we put kitchen shears to the test. And finally, transform your fried chicken and turkey with this ancient ingredient.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: Our recipe for poached eggs in chickpea shakshuka is perfect for a weeknight meal. Later, we explain why the yolk is the best part of the egg. Finally, a good nonstick skillet could be the key to turning out perfect fried eggs.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents
programme.desc: Learn the science behind our crispy Korean fried chicken wings. We test the top electric deep-fryers. And finally, learn how to make crispy skillet turkey burgers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen Presents

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Phil Serrell embark on a new Road Trip. Purchases include a garden fountain and a home-made post box. Phil wears shorts and Irita runs away to the circus.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil encounter a great bustard and a lesser spotted Dunhill while touring Norfolk and Lincolnshire. Phil also turns magpie with the silver but who will fly at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil spends every last penny, while Irita buys a vase for a pound. Irita favours mutton sleeves in Hull, while Phil steps out of the classic car to be turned into a pumpkin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil are in the Northeast and, after losing three auctions in a row, Phil fights back with a huge Methodist church sign! Will it pay off or will Irita do it again?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Irita and Phil's last outing in the gold classic car and the pressure gauge is reading high! Can Mr Serrell clutch victory just as they race towards the finish line?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Irita Marriott finds a 19th century automaton and learns about a hero from The Great War. Raj Bisram buys a damaged Stoneware Doulton flask and discovers how Princess Catherine helped rescue Jewish families from Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Up in Northamptonshire, Irita Marriott picks up a B&B sign and a Japanese Satsuma pot, while Raj Bisram finds an Art Deco silver trinket box and a kaleidoscope from 1905. Plus a visit to the only surviving medieval town belfry in England.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to Oxfordshire in their 1978 MG Midget. Irita finds some hefty items and Raj discovers some items no gardener should be without. The day ends at an auction held in a former railway station hotel.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram finds a huge haul of famous pottery while Irita Marriott gets her hands on something that brings back happy childhood memories. Plus a visit to the Devon Sculpture Park and the delights of a Devonshire cream tea.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram pins his hopes on a risky item that may or may not be highly collectable. Irita Marriott finds a painting that contains a hidden secret. Along the way there's some sightseeing, kite flying and, of course, pirate impressions.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst and Margie Cooper set off for Cumbria in a 1970s campervan, looking for antiques. Tim picks up a Scots Guards picture and rare Scottish jug, while Margie chooses a silver locket and bracelet. Plus a visit to a Roman fort.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Margie buys a French carriage clock, a Chinese pepperette and a candlestick from Derbyshire. Tim falls for the image of a Victorian woman, though his Victorian horse toy might make for a bumpy ride at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to the Wimbledon's All England Lawn Tennis Club where items of interest include memorabilia from the first London Olympics.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Manchester Town Hall; a painted panel is featured.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Pitzhanger Manor and Gallery in Ealing, West London, where treasures include a royal paintbox, a collection of Italian jewelry and a medal awarded to a carrier pigeon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Admiring the innovative design of the Firstsite gallery; inspecting a car racer's prized Heuer Carrera timepiece; investigating a white Minton teapot, a pair of designer Ikea chairs and a militaria collection that commemorates an allied escape.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow returns to Pitzhanger Manor and Gallery in West London, where finds include a unique engagement ring, a note written by Oscar Wilde and an Olympic medal from the 1930s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tackle a collection of rare football shirts, a fancy brooch that got stuck in a sock drawer and a kicky mule-themed money box; a look at a drawing from a famous ballet dancer, a quirky bird clock and a sailor's woolwork picture.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank pregunta si un encuentro con activistas comunitarios fue un accidente o una trampa. Jamie se esfuerza por depender menos de la información de Frank para tomar decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales robos y asesinatos en hogares de Inland Empire, en California. Al parecer, se trata de ataques relacionados con bandas callejeras, pero la investigación pronto arroja una motivación aún más siniestra.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Atlanta para investigar el asesinato de una mujer, descubriendo que el criminal no trabaja solo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Varias parejas que están en proceso de adoptar niños en Seattle empiezan a ser asesinadas. La UAC busca a un criminal que tiene un perfil muy pronunciado de instinto maternal, aunque asesino. Por otro lado, García tiene miedo de hablar con Kevin.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un niño llamado Ángel aparece en medio del desierto con profundas cargas psicológicas al haber sido capturado por un psicópata. El niño no puede articular palabras, pero él es el único que puede dar una pista para salvar a otro niño desaparecido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras el rescate de un pequeño bote con oficiales de la Armada heridos, el equipo se ve obligado a esconderse después de descubrir terroristas a bordo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el cuerpo de un teniente de la marina al que le falta un ojo, llevándoles al mundo de las luchas enjauladas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un intruso en Quantico, Jimmy y Kasie se ven expuestos a una biotoxina mortal y deben pedir ayuda a la doctora Carol Wilson para encontrar el antídoto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo investiga la muerte de un cirujano reservista voluntario de los Navy SEALs, se ven obligados a solicitar la ayuda de Kayla (Naomi Grace), la hija de Vance, para llevar a cabo una misión peligrosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank pregunta si un encuentro con activistas comunitarios fue un accidente o una trampa. Jamie se esfuerza por depender menos de la información de Frank para tomar decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain. Deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shoplifter flees on foot after stealing kids' shoes, an erratic driver has a concealed firearm (and something less concealed), and a man on probation gets his car searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: Pasión por el triunfo 3: persiguiendo un sueño
programme.desc: Un patinador de hielo y su nueva pareja se sienten atraídos mutuamente mientras entrenan para competir en París.

programme.title: Ni Idea (Clueless)
programme.desc: El mundo de Cher se desenmaraña cuando aparecen dos galanes: un compañero de clase sexy, y su simple pero lindo ex hermanastro. Ahora se da cuenta de que cuando se trata de amor, no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Cosa de hombres
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: ¿Bailamos?
programme.desc: John Clark es un adicto al trabajo dócil que se siente atrapado en una existencia aburrida y soporífera. Una noche, su vida cambia tras ver a una hermosa instructora de danza que lo inspira a salirse de sus esquemas y aprender pasos elaborados.

programme.title: Todos a bailar
programme.desc: Un chico rebelde de la gran ciudad en un pueblo conservador del medio oeste, donde el baile y cualquier disfrute juvenil han sido prohibidos.

programme.title: Barrio chino
programme.desc: Jakes Gittes, investigador privado, revela una red de escándalos personales y políticos cuando es contratado por una hermosa mujer de alta sociedad para investigar las relaciones extramatrimoniales de su esposo.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Una ataviada historia que entreteje la opulencia de un hacendado, la codicia y envidia de quien quiere arrebatarle sus propiedades y en medio, las víctimas junto con quienes vienen a exigir justicia.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Muchachos impacientes
programme.desc: Estrellas y rivales juntos en una hilarante comedia musical. Grandes voces se unen en un espectáculo benéfico donde ocurrirán muchos disparates.

programme.title: Mujeres encantadoras
programme.desc: Un grupo de mujeres sospechan que sus parejas son infieles y arman un enredo a los pobres mujeriegos involucrados.

programme.title: Muñecas Peligrosas
programme.desc: Cuatro valientes y aguerridas mujeres pelean contra una pandilla de criminales que quiere apoderarse de una valiosa fórmula de un científico.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Dos madres angustiadas, cuyos hijos murieron por disparos en un automóvil en movimiento, se unen para vengar sus muertes después de que las autoridades locales no tomen medidas.

programme.title: Abuso de poder
programme.desc: Cuatro policías agresivos y deshonestos investigan el asesinato de una joven. Cuando descubren que estaba vinculada emocionalmente con su jefe, un destacado general del ejército estadounidense, intentan encubrir el asesinato.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Sangre, sudor y gloria
programme.desc: Un equipo de fisicoculturistas de Miami llevan una vida de lujo a través del secuestro y de la extorsión en esta comedia policial basada en una historia real.

programme.title: El tren de la muerte
programme.desc: Jon Voight y Eric Roberts interpretan a un par de presos que en su fuga suben a un tren de mercancías, pero cuando el maquinista muere de un ataque al corazón, se encuentran atrapados, solos y a toda velocidad hacia un desastre seguro.

programme.title: Fuego en el cielo
programme.desc: En 1975, el leñador Travis Walteron y sus compañeros de trabajo descubrieron un ovni sobrevolando. Los amigos de Walton huyeron, pero Walton no tuvo tanta fortuna. Tras su abducción a la extraña nave, es sometido a un estudio médico doloroso.

programme.title: Descubriendo el país de nunca jamás
programme.desc: Fantasía y realidad confluyen en este éxito memorable que explora los orígenes de una de las fábulas más maravillosas de todos los tiempos: Peter Pan. Nominada a siete Premios Óscar, incluida la mejor película.

programme.title: Cinema Paradiso
programme.desc: En esta célebre película ganadora del Óscar a Mejor Película Extranjera, un famoso cineasta italiano, atormentado por los recuerdos de su primer amor, regresa a su pueblo natal después de 30 años de ausencia.

programme.title: Una vida sin terminar
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) vive en una hacienda de Wyoming con su único amigo, Mitch (Morgan Freeman), cuando la mujer a la que culpa por la muerte de su único hijo llega a su puerta sin dinero, desesperada y con una nieta a la que no conocía.

programme.title: Las torres gemelas
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage y Michael Peña protagonizan a dos policías de la Autoridad Portuaria de Nueva York que quedaron atrapados entre los escombros el 11 de septiembre de 2001.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Valkiria
programme.desc: Una dramatización del asesinato y complot político del 20 de julio de 1944 por oficiales del ejército alemán renegados desesperados contra Adolf Hitler durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Minority Report: sentencia previa
programme.desc: Minority Report es sobre un policía del futuro que trabaja en una división del departamento de policía arrestando asesinos antes de que cometan crímenes, gracias a una avanzada tecnología de premoniciones.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Las tortugas ninja están mejor que nunca en este éxito de taquilla cargado de acción y risas imparables. Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York está en problemas, le corresponde salvarla a estos cuatro hermanos ninja, amantes de la pizza.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras
programme.desc: Las tortugas vuelven para pelear contra más villanos junto a su nuevo aliado Casey Jones. Cuando el supervillano Shredder escapa con su plan de conquistar al mundo, los hermanos se preparan para vencerlo, pero enfrentarán a una mayor amenaza: Krang.

programme.title: A.I. Inteligencia artificial
programme.desc: En un mundo futuro, los humanos comparten aspectos de su vida con robots de compañía llamados "Mechas". Pero cuando un prototipo de niño-robot llamado David es programado para demostrar amor incondicional..

programme.title: Bob Esponja: un héroe fuera del agua
programme.desc: Con la misión de salvar su mundo, ¡Bob Esponja se dirige al nuestro por primera vez en la vida! Cuando el pirata Barba Burger roba la receta de las Cangreburger, Bob Esponja y sus amigos se transformarán en superhéroes para vencer al supervillano.

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Las tortugas ninja están mejor que nunca en este éxito de taquilla cargado de acción y risas imparables. Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York está en problemas, le corresponde salvarla a estos cuatro hermanos ninja, amantes de la pizza.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras
programme.desc: Las tortugas vuelven para pelear contra más villanos junto a su nuevo aliado Casey Jones. Cuando el supervillano Shredder escapa con su plan de conquistar al mundo, los hermanos se preparan para vencerlo, pero enfrentarán a una mayor amenaza: Krang.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (ESP)
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Asesinos internacionales
programme.desc: Asesinos disfuncionales intentan matar a Gunther (Arnold Schwarzenegger), el asesino a sueldo más infame de todos los tiempos, en esta divertida comedia de persecución entre aspirantes a criminales.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Guerra de papás 2
programme.desc: Dusty (Mark Wahlberg) y Brad (Will Ferrell) creen dominar la coparentalidad… hasta que llegan sus padres y ponen a prueba su alianza en esta divertida comedia.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: La isla mínima
programme.desc: Se producen una serie de crímenes brutales contra chicas adolescentes en un paraje remoto del sur de España. Dos detectives, con personalidades contrapuestas, son designados para investigar.

programme.title: Prim: El Asesinato de la Calle del Turco
programme.desc: Biopic histórico sobre el complot para asesinar al general Prim. La acción se sitúa tras el fin de la revolución Gloriosa en 1868 y finaliza con la proclamación del rey Amadeo I de Saboya.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: La casa del demonio
programme.desc: Desesperada por dinero fácil, la estudiante de segundo año Samantha Hughes (Jocelin Donahue) acepta trabajar como niñera en la apartada mansión de la extraña familia Ulman.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: La venganza de Cenicienta
programme.desc: En este oscuro giro al clásico cuento, Cenicienta busca venganza contra quienes la maltrataron, convirtiéndose en una heroína feroz que enfrenta su destino con valentía.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: La piel fría
programme.desc: Un joven llega a una isla remota para ocupar un puesto de observador meteorológico y luego se encuentra defendiendo la torre de vigilancia, contra las criaturas mortales que viven en la costa de la isla.

programme.title: Venganza diabólica
programme.desc: Un hombre conjura a un demonio aterrador llamado Pumpkinhead para llevar a cabo su venganza en contra de los adolescentes, quienes sin querer, mataron a su hijo.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: Boots And Saddles
programme.desc: A British youngster inherits a ranch so burdened with taxes that he struggles to keep the property. Gene Autry befriends the boy, and becomes involved with an Army colonel's daughter and others.

programme.title: The Old Barn Dance
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Frog Millhouse are horse traders who run into trouble when an unscrupulous tractor company starts selling the modern machines to farmers.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum (1961)
programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: A Bucket Of Blood
programme.desc: Café busboy Walter ventures into the world of sculpting with a small statue called Dead Cat. Unfortunately, Dead Cat is followed by Murdered Man. By the time we reach Walter’s interest in the female form...well, you get the picture.

programme.title: After The Fox
programme.desc: Pretending to be a movie director, an Italian crook known as The Fox (Peter Sellers) cons local villagers and the police into smuggling into Rome the loot from a $3 million Cairo bullion robbery...as part of the film script!

programme.title: A Canterbury Tale
programme.desc: Set amid the tumult of the Second World War, the film follows three modern-day incarnations of Chaucer’s pilgrims, who are forced to solve a bizarre village crime in the English countryside en route to the mythical town of Canterbury.

programme.title: I Know Where I'm Going!
programme.desc: A young Englishwoman goes to the Hebrides to marry her older, wealthier fiancé. When the weather keeps them separated on different islands, she begins to have second thoughts.

programme.title: The Life And Death Of Colonel Blimp
programme.desc: From the Boer War through World War II, a soldier rises through the ranks in the British military.

programme.title: Black Narcissus
programme.desc: A group of nuns struggle to establish a convent in the Himalayas, while isolation, extreme weather, altitude, and culture clashes all conspire to drive the well-intentioned missionaries mad.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for the weekend and Edith leaves for a baby shower. Archie accidently locks himself in the basement. After finding a bottle of vodka, Archie spends a long night contemplating his life through the haze of a drunken stupor.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Wanting to try something new, Gloria buys a brunette wig and it immediately arouses Mike, who desperately tries to get Gloria to wear it while they make love. However, Gloria is insulted which leads to a big fight that lands Mike to sleeping on the couch.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: For her 25th wedding anniversary, Edith is planning a romantic second honeymoon getaway to Atlantic City, the same place they went on their first honeymoon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude plans a dinner party for her friend, U.S. Congresswoman MacIlhaney, and then plans a new job as her assistant. But Maude could never plan on what's yet to come in the first episode of a three-part story.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude mourns the moving of her dearest friends the Harmons until the death of someone close has a drastic effect on her mood...and her life...on the second of a three-part episode.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp begins! The newly elected training camp candidates are excited, even star-struck, as they meet the veterans for the first time at Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The group competes in a grueling army fitness test to try and earn the privilege of being on the elite "Power Squad." At that evening's rehearsal, the first cuts will be made.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies are given "makeovers" to transform them into the image of a DCC.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The entire squad needs a wake-up call and guest choreographer Kitty Carter gives it to them.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final dance rehearsal of week 7 has a surprise guest judge who puts everyone on edge. Ultimately, in Kelli's office, the tears flow as some dreams surprisingly come to an end.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Join 65,000 screaming Cowboys fans as the cheerleaders hit the turf and wow the entire stadium and themselves during their first Dallas Cowboys football game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad with all the emotion and drama as hundreds of women hope to fill the 45-member team.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: If the candidates thought auditions were tough, they have no idea how brutal training camp will be. Kelli has to call three girls into her office for warnings...who will survive the first week of training camp?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's only the third week of training camp and it's already time to make cuts. Who will survive? The week starts with uniform fittings where even the wannabes get to try on the famous blue and white star-studded outfit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The girls are in the dark about what Kelli and salon director Rainer Schneck have planned for them when they get their dramatic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: When DCC Director, Kelli Finglass, gives a former contestant a once-in-a-lifetime second chance to join training camp three weeks late, there is a lot of catching up to do.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: She's back! The notoriously demanding Kitty Carter comes to Valley Ranch to teach the intimidated DCC a technique class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy are forced to make tough decisions that are fair, but unfortunate. It's now or never for the remaining training camp candidates as there are only two rehearsals left before final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: North Carolina detectives search for answers in the murder of 28-year-old Fayetteville construction worker James Chambers; featuring interviews with James' family members and investigators at the center of the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman and her dogs disappear from their home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Lester Holt spends two nights locked up and embedded inside the largest maximum security prison in America, the notorious Louisiana State Penitentiary, also known as Angola.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police investigate the shooting death of a man who was in bed with his wife, they discover a complex case with two suspects.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police begin to doubt a man's claim that his wife was murdered by a friend.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A similar abduction in New Mexico helps crack the case of a 19-year-old missing college student in Oregon.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police link a filmmaker who is obsessed with the show "Dexter" with a man's disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Fifteen Beds and a Bucket of Puke
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 women to his macadocious mansion with the hope of finding the next great love of his life.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Rub a Dub Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fifteen Flavorettes to a never before attempted hot tub speed dating competition.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Friend of Flav's is a Friend of Mine
programme.desc: Ten girls are left and the competition is getting stiff. Flav divides the girls into groups of five and presents them with two challenges.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Flavor of Chicken
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has a special surprise for his eight remaining ladies. His “moms”, Anna Drayton has come to visit.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: What Happens in Flavor Stays in Flavor
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is a good luck person. So he needs a good luck woman. To test the girls on this trait, he flies the seven remaining women to Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: InterroGitted
programme.desc: There's six girls left so Flav brings out the big guns. He flies Brigitte Neilsen into town to get to know the girls a little better.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav's Trippin
programme.desc: Flav takes two of the young ladies to Palm Springs for a spa retreat where things get muddy, wet and crazy.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Family Flavors
programme.desc: Three girls are left! Things are getting serious so Flav decides it's time to meet the ladies' parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Slaps, Smacks, Screams and Spit You Never Saw
programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Towa decides to return to the feudal era to help Setsuna regain her memories. The trio enter the corridor leading to the feudal era, but within it awaits the spirit of a certain priestess.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa and Setsuna take on a request to slay Jakotsumaru, a boy who has been extracting bones from humans and beasts in order to revive his father, the demon beast Tokotsu.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Travelers are going missing one after another. Towa, Setsuna, and Moroha head to the northern mountains to crack the case, but instead, they find a village completely overrun by ghost cats!

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: On her way to search for the Dream Butterfly, Towa meets a strange young man named Riku. Towa offers him an apple, and in thanks, Riku presents her with the genuine Kikujumonji sword.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: After fleeing from the deputy shogun’s estate, Yotsume borrows the power of a Rainbow Pearl to unleash his Dream Gazing spell upon the Half-Demon Princesses, who are hot on his trail.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Moroha accepts a job to slay Konton, a member of the Four Perils said to have defeated Meioju, a demon beast with the ultimate armored shell.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The Half-Demon Princesses are tasked with slaying Kinka and Ginka, conjoined twins of the Ka Demon Tribe whose battles for dominance have been wreaking havoc everywhere.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo de auto insiste que un monstruo lo persigue. Los policías son testigos de una pelea entre esposos. Los oficiales investigan dos hombres en un auto con drogas escondidas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un peatón corre sospechosamente en una calle oscura. Las cosas terminan mal para un sospechoso en moto robada cuando un helicóptero lo rastrea. Una pelea doméstica entre una pareja descubre otros crímenes imprevistos.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una mujer casi termina en la cárcel por haber subido al auto de un desconocido. Una prostituta se mete en problemas serios con la policía tras ser detenida. Un compañero de casa rehúsa violentamente a mudarse y los agentes intervienen.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La policía detiene a un hombre con orden de aprensión quien exige hablar con su esposa. Un ladrón intenta devolver lo que robó en una licorería. Una mujer se descontrola al ser interrogada por los agentes, quienes descubren la razón de su comportamiento.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta esconderse en un ático ajeno pero los oficiales logran detenerlo. Se detiene a un hombre con un corazón roto y algunos secretos ilegales. Discusiones personales interrumpen la noche y los vecinos tienen que llamar a la policía.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Presenta el trabajo de expertos forenses de renombre mundial y los procedimientos que utilizan para resolver asesinatos y otros misterios en minutos o siglos después de que sucedan.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Entomología forense: los insectos han vagado por la tierra durante 250 millones de años; sin embargo, su asociación íntima con la muerte acaba de cobrar vida.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Huellas dactilares: el Departamento de Identificación del FBI confía en las huellas digitales como una de las formas más eficaces para identificar a los delincuentes.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Es difícil condenar a un asesino sin encontrar el cuerpo. Pero la ciencia forense puede encontrar maneras de hacerlo. Los asesinos astutos pueden deshacerse de los restos de sus víctimas, pero a menudo no son rivales para investigadores creativos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Anchorage, Alaska, una madre joven y sus dos hijas fueron violadas y brutalmente asesinadas. Solo había una pieza de evidencia forense: una toalla con ladillas que el asesino usó para limpiarse después del crimen.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Claude Dallas vivía la vida de un vaquero. Un solitario y desconfiado de la autoridad, vivía de la tierra, practicando la caza furtiva y vendiendo pieles.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1984, el sur de Miami se convirtió en el hogar de un asesino en serie sádico. Haciéndose pasar por un fotógrafo de modas, Cristopher Wilder atraía a mujeres jóvenes que iban de compras con la promesa de fama y fortuna. La mayoría terminaron muertas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Súbete a bordo de un viaje lleno de diversión y risas mientras Little Angel se adentra en una aventura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un viaje en el que atraviesan situaciones inesperadas con valentía y creatividad, demostrando que incluso los pequeños retos pueden superarse con un poco de ayuda de los amigos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels para un baño de burbujas lleno de diversión, donde hacen de cuenta que bañarse es divertido, pero con burbujas es la bonanza de la diversión.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus aventuras de juego. Desde la imitación hasta los sustos a la hora de dormir, lavarse las manos, la paciencia, la búsqueda de juguetes, las ovejas sucias y el alegre cucú, ¡es un día de risas y juegos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras! Desde tomar turnos hasta descubrir el cuerpo, las rutinas antes de dormir, superar enfermedades, la seguridad en la nieve y la diversión en Londres, ¡cada momento trae alegría y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas. Con sus amigos y familiares, Mía, de 6 años, experimenta el mundo que la rodea a través de canciones.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una divertida fiesta familiar, donde se embarcan en una serie de aventuras que celebran las alegrías de la unión y el aprendizaje.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.desc: Karen entró en contacto con Álvaro por una red social, pero cuando él le propuso dar el siguiente paso en la relación ella se negó y Álvaro terminó borrándola de su red de amistades. Hoy día Karen necesita la ayuda de Diego y Sebastián.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace ya dos años que Freddy mantiene una relación en línea, se contactaron por las redes sociales y a medida que se fueron conociendo, comenzó a florecer una relación de amor en línea.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Cristian nunca se imaginó que una mujer como Andrea se fijaría en él, en un principio no lo tomó en serio y creía que era todo una broma. Pero luego de un tiempo, él y Andrea comenzaron a tener una relación en línea.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
